content:
1️⃣ Alternative Text Proposals & Weekly Recommendations Discussion

✅ Yes to maintaining alternative text flexibility for final projects, but now with an ongoing weekly engagement component.

📜 Updated Structure for Alternative Texts:
1. Final Project Proposal (Week 10-11)
• Deadline: By Week 10, submit a formal 200-300 word proposal (as outlined previously).
• Instructor Approval System remains in place.
2. 📌 New Weekly Extra Credit: “The Reading Exchange”
• Weekly discussion folder for students to submit reading recommendations that tie into that week’s themes.
• Format:
• 150-200 words
• 📖 Title & Author
• 🔍 Connection to Course Themes
• 🎯 Why This Text Matters
• Goal: Encourage curated recommendations so students organically build a living syllabus.
• Incentive: Earn extra credit for thoughtful recommendations (NOT just listing books).
